Discharge Summary — Patient with Type 2 Diabetes: Patient is a 58-year-old male admitted for uncontrolled hyperglycemia with HbA1c of 11.2% on admission. During the five-day inpatient stay, insulin therapy was optimized and diabetes education was provided by the certified diabetes educator. At discharge, the patient was transitioned to metformin 1000mg twice daily and glipizide 10mg daily, with a follow-up appointment scheduled with endocrinology in two weeks. Patient was counseled on dietary modifications, blood glucose monitoring protocol, and signs of hypoglycemia.
